holdings.name: Global X Long-Term Treasury Ladder ETF

raw.n: Global X Long-Term Treasury Ladder ETF

holdings.n: Global X Long-Term Treasury Ladder ETF

overview.description: The Global X Treasury Bond Enhanced Income ETF (TLTX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund provides exposure to long-term US Treasury securities. To generate additional income, the actively managed ETF writes call options on a portion of its assets. TLTX was launched on Jul 15, 2025 and is issued by Global X.
